item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response stays in direct judgment mode and treats the prompt as metric trend/decision analysis, not as a repeated local repair or triage-triggering case. It gives a practical logistics-provider decision framework: attribution, segmentation, SLA review, cost impact, options, pilot, and decision rules. No triage false fire or runtime over-methodization is observed."}
